mapper.sql: id, order_no, student_name, student_phone, product_id, product_amount, discount_amount, order_status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into prepay_order (order_no, student_name, student_phone, product_id, product_amount, discount_amount, order_status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{studentName}, #{studentPhone}, #{productId}, #{productAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update prepay_order set student_name = #{studentName}, student_phone = #{studentPhone}, product_id = #{productId}, product_amount = #{productAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from prepay_order where order_no = #{orderNo} limit 1

select from prepay_order
and ( student_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or student_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and order_status = #{orderStatus}
order by id desc
select from prepay_order where student_phone = #{studentPhone} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update prepay_order set order_status = 'SUCCESS' where order_no = #{prepayOrderNo} and order_status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
